description: Generous baseline budget for the manual high_bot_soak_degradation policy: a ten-minute eight-bot mm-rage frame-command soak that preserves command throughput, route throughput, active bots, route cleanliness, debug coverage, and progress reporting while allowing item-reservation occupancy to decay.

pass.description: High-bot invariant: the smoke harness must pass.

duration_sec.description: High-bot invariant: expected ten-minute soak with startup/shutdown timing slack.

bot_count.description: High-bot invariant: this budget is scoped to the eight-bot soak.

commands_per_bot_sec.description: High-bot invariant: detects severe command starvation or runaway duplicate command submission.

route_commands_per_bot_sec.description: High-bot invariant: route-steered command throughput should track overall command throughput.

route_queries_per_bot_sec.description: Pressure budget: derived route-query rate from the 2026-06-28 source-counter baseline plus slack.

route_refresh_ratio.description: Pressure budget: route refreshes should stay within the 2026-06-28 source-counter baseline plus slack.

route_reuse_ratio.description: Pressure budget: route cache reuse should remain a meaningful share of route requests after the 2026-06-28 source-counter baseline.

debug_work_units_per_bot_sec.description: Pressure budget: debug overlay work proxy while route and goal debug are enabled.

recovery_command_uses_per_bot_sec.description: Pressure budget: recovery command churn budget with headroom over the first soak baseline.

progress_reports.description: High-bot invariant: ten-minute soak should report roughly once per minute.

bot_frame_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Optional source-counter budget: bot frame CPU is not required until long-soak CPU baselines are stable; the cap carries headroom for normal local scheduler and combat-state variance above the 2026-06-29 post-change soak samples.

route_query_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Optional source-counter budget: WORR route-query CPU is not required for legacy soak logs.

route_reuse_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Optional source-counter budget: route-reuse timing may be omitted by low-overhead builds.

q3a_route_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Optional source-counter budget: Q3A route CPU is not required for legacy soak logs.

expected_min_commands.description: High-bot invariant: the final status should still identify the eight-bot target.

commands.description: High-bot invariant: raw final status command count should show sustained bot command throughput.

route_commands.description: High-bot invariant: raw final status route command count should show sustained route steering.

route_failures.description: High-bot invariant: no route failures are acceptable for this baseline smoke.

route_invalid_slots.description: High-bot invariant: no invalid route slots should be observed.

route_debug_missing_frames.description: High-bot invariant: route debug output should keep pace with route command frames.

skipped_inactive.description: High-bot invariant: all eight bots should stay active through the soak.
